pages.text: Part of $(l:creatures/death)Death$(/l)'s accoutrements, Death Hood changes the wearer's face to resemble that of Death. Can be repaired in an $(item)Anvil$() using $(item)Iron Ingots$().

pages.title: Special Properties
pages.text: If the wearer stares at a creature of player, it will feel Death's gaze and will find it much harder to move.$(br)Additionally, the wearer will be able to see much easier in dark places.
Part of $(l:creatures/death)Death$(/l)'s accoutrements, Death Hood changes the wearer's torso to resemble that of Death. Can be repaired in an $(item)Anvil$() using $(item)Iron Ingots$().

pages.title: Special Properties
pages.text: Death's Robe grants immunity to $(item)Fire$() and $(item)Lava$() to whoever wears it.
Part of $(l:creatures/death)Death$(/l)'s accoutrements, Death Hood changes the wearer's legs and feet to resemble that of Death. Can be repaired in an $(item)Anvil$() using $(item)Iron Ingots$().

pages.title: Special Properties
pages.text: While wearing Death's Footwear, one can walk on water and other liquids. This ability is precarious since it requires concentration: getting hit may result in the magic being temporarily broken.
